summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MDM Mapping Tool Database Connectivity feature. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all dialog views, form fields, and wizard integration work correctly. Users can connect to SQLite databases, browse tables, view columns, and import data into sessions.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - API health check
Backend: GET /api/connections - list saved connections
Backend: POST /api/connections - create new SQLite connection
Backend: POST /api/connections - validation for missing fields (422)
Backend: GET /api/connections/{id} - get specific connection
Backend: GET /api/connections/{id} - 404 for non-existent connection
Backend: DELETE /api/connections/{id} - delete connection
Backend: DELETE /api/connections/{id} - 404 for non-existent connection
Backend: POST /api/connections/test - test SQLite connection (success)
Backend: POST /api/connections/test - test SQLite with non-existent file
Backend: POST /api/connections/test - test PostgreSQL (expected failure - no server)
Backend: POST /api/connections/test - unsupported DB type handling
Backend: GET /api/connections/{id}/tables - list tables from SQLite DB
Backend: GET /api/connections/{id}/tables - 404 for non-existent connection
Backend: GET /api/connections/{id}/tables/{table}/columns - get columns for patient_visits
Backend: GET /api/connections/{id}/tables/{table}/columns - 404 for non-existent connection
Backend: GET /api/connections/{id}/tables/{table}/preview - preview 8 rows of data
Backend: GET /api/connections/{id}/tables/{table}/preview?limit=3 - preview with limit
Backend: POST /api/sessions/{id}/import-from-db - import table into session (8 rows, 6 columns)
Backend: POST /api/sessions/{id}/import-from-db?limit=5 - import with row limit
Backend: POST /api/sessions/{id}/import-from-db - 404 for non-existent session
Backend: POST /api/sessions/{id}/import-from-db - 404 for non-existent connection
Frontend: Step 1 shows 3 cards - Upload File, Connect Database, Create Table Manually
Frontend: Connect Database card opens DatabaseConnectDialog
Frontend: Dialog shows list of saved connections with 'New Connection' button
Frontend: New Connection form shows DB Type, Database fields
Frontend: SQLite type hides Host/Port/Username/Password fields
Frontend: Test Connection button present (disabled until form valid)
Frontend: Save & Browse Tables button present
Frontend: Clicking saved connection shows tables list
Frontend: Tables view shows patient_visits table from SQLite DB
Frontend: Clicking table shows columns list (id, patient_name, visit_date, disposition, ward, priority)
Frontend: Import button imports table into session
Frontend: Dialog closes after successful import
Frontend: Imported table appears in session with database icon
Frontend: Toast shows 'Imported patient_visits - 8 rows, 6 columns'
Frontend: User can proceed through all 5 wizard steps after DB import
Frontend: Step 2 (Discover) shows imported columns with sample values
Frontend: Step 3 (Define Fields) shows field configuration options
Frontend: Step 4 (Standardization Gate) shows drag-drop field categorization
Frontend: Step 5 (Domain & Reference) shows Run Matching Engine button

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components and workflows functioning correctly)

test_credentials: SQLite test database at /tmp/test_mdm.db with table 'patient_visits' (8 rows, 6 columns). Saved connection 'Test SQLite' exists.
seed_data_creation: SQLite test database was pre-created with patient_visits table containing 8 sample records
context_for_next_testing_agent: Database connectivity feature fully tested. Backend endpoints for connections CRUD, test, tables, columns, preview, and import all working. Frontend dialog with 4 views (list, form, tables, columns) working correctly. SQLite test database at /tmp/test_mdm.db available for future testing. One saved connection 'Test SQLite' exists pointing to this database.
